rq: Does the silhouette signature reproduce on cloud endpoints beyond OpenAI direct? (Phase 2 baseline: silhouette 0.5566 at k=5 on openai/gpt-4o-mini single endpoint via streaming TTFT/TPS fingerprint, n=700 valid, 2026-04-30. Phase 2-bis Sub-exp 1 tests this generalization across 9 endpoints / 6 providers.)
kill_criteria: all endpoints simultaneously rate-limited > 2 fires consecutively
ANY endpoint changes streaming protocol or model id mid-collection

harness_hardening_proof.fix1_commit_hash: 442427d feat(hadf-phase2bis-replication): Block A — soak window scaffolding (12 tasks, all tests pass) (#316) — establishes worktree-local venv pattern (Fix #1) via scripts/hadf-phase2bis-collect.sh preflight Check A (venv binary executable)

launch_matrix_narrowing.decision_reason: Pre-launch matrix narrowing to original Phase 2 intent (openai + anthropic). Smoke-fire revealed: (1) gemini-2.5-flash + gemini-2.5-pro are reasoning models — different signal class (TTFT measures hidden-reasoning latency, not generation); (2) mistral/xai/vercel-ai-gateway placeholder keys not yet minted by operator; (3) xAI grok-4-1 model name potentially invalid. Per Q2/Q3 operator decisions 2026-05-25.

endpoints_dropped.reason: reasoning model (thoughts_token_count=189/200 in smoke-fire — only 7 visible tokens)
placeholder key in .env.local at 2026-05-25 lock time
placeholder key + mistralai 2.4.7 SDK namespace drift (resolved via openai-compat in commit 3784373, but no real key yet)
placeholder key + model name 'grok-4-1' likely invalid (real xAI models: grok-2-latest, grok-beta, grok-4)

launch_matrix_narrowing.follow_up: Sub-exp 1B will exercise the full 9-endpoint matrix after key acquisition (see hadf-phase2bis-key-acquisition-runbook-2026-05-25.md) + reasoning-model investigation. Sub-exp 1A (this run) establishes the 4-endpoint openai+anthropic fingerprint baseline.
